directives.title: Directive on NCII Entity Registration Procedures
directives.subject: Procedures for NCII entity registration, designation acknowledgment, and transition requirements for existing operators

directives.title: Directive on Risk Assessment Methodology
directives.subject: Detailed risk assessment methodology requirements, threat categorization, vulnerability scoring, and risk calculation approaches for NCII entities

directives.title: Directive on Audit Standards and Frequency
directives.subject: Audit standards, scope requirements, auditor competency criteria, and minimum audit frequency for NCII entities

directives.title: Directive on Incident Notification Timelines and Format
directives.subject: Detailed notification format templates, significant impact classification criteria, escalation procedures, and follow-up reporting requirements for cyber security incidents

directives.title: Directive on NCII Information Sharing
directives.subject: Information sharing protocols, classification handling, secure channels, and trust frameworks for threat intelligence exchange among NCII entities, sector leads, and NACSA
directives.applicableTo: All NCII entities and NCII sector leads

directives.title: Directive on Cyber Security Service Provider Obligations
directives.subject: Professional conduct standards, reporting obligations, and operational requirements for licensed cyber security service providers
directives.applicableTo: All licensed cyber security service providers under Part V of the Act

directives.title: Directive on CoP Development Guidelines
directives.subject: Guidance to NCII sector leads on developing, structuring, and maintaining sector-specific codes of practice for cyber security

directives.title: Directive on Vulnerability Disclosure
directives.subject: Coordinated vulnerability disclosure framework for NCII entities, including responsible disclosure timelines, researcher engagement protocols, and remediation requirements

directives.title: Directive on Threat Intelligence Sharing
directives.subject: Threat intelligence sharing formats, platforms, classification levels, and sharing protocols between NCII entities, sector leads, and NACSA
directives.applicableTo: All NCII entities and NCII sector leads

directives.title: Directive on NCII Asset Categorization
directives.subject: Framework for categorizing NCII assets by criticality, impact level, and dependency relationships
